overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a morning walk through a Los Santos neighborhood, transitioning from a graffiti-lined sidewalk past a corner liquor store into a residential area with palm trees and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside graffiti-covered wall approaching commercial intersection

events.description: red SUV drives past on the street from left to right
black sedan approaches and passes through the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered brick wall, approaching a commercial intersection

notable_agents.action: red SUV driving along the street, passing the camera's position

entered.detail: red brick wall with large red and purple graffiti tags running along the sidewalk
white and orange commercial building with red signage and large rooftop billboard structure
wooden power line poles with multiple crossbars lining the street
tall palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view walking along a sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered brick wall. The camera approaches a commercial intersection with a liquor store visible ahead. Vehicles including a red SUV and black sedan pass by on the multi-lane street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with corner store and billboard transitioning to residential

events.description: silver sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
passing the liquor store, entering residential neighborhood with single-family homes

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the commercial building, turning slightly right as the street curves

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large elevated billboard platform above the liquor store with visible advertisements
single-story suburban houses with front yards and driveways
white metal chain-link fence running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the commercial liquor store with its prominent billboard structure, transitioning from the commercial corner into a residential area. The graffiti wall falls behind as single-family homes appear on the right side, separated from the sidewalk by a chain-link fence. Traffic continues to pass on the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with palm trees and single-family homes

events.description: passing a red and white foreclosure for-sale sign posted near the sidewalk
approaching two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the residential neighborhood, approaching pedestrians ahead on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk, one wearing a purple shirt

entered.detail: real estate sign reading 'FORECLOSURE FOR SALE' with agent photo and contact information
weathered wooden garage door with white graffiti tags
red octagonal stop sign at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a walk through a quiet residential neighborhood with palm trees lining the street and single-family homes close to the sidewalk. The camera passes a foreclosure sign and continues toward two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A weathered garage door with graffiti and a stop sign at the intersection become visible as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk that transitions from a gritty commercial intersection into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins along a sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered brick wall, moving toward a commercial corner where a red SUV and black sedan pass by on a multi-lane street. As the camera passes a liquor store and its prominent billboard, the urban graffiti fades away and the environment shifts toward a residential zone marked by single-family homes behind chain-link fences. The scene then opens into a calmer neighborhood lined with palm trees, passing a foreclosure sign and two oncoming pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves toward a weathered garage door and a stop sign at a nearby intersection.
